## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, optimization efforts, and next steps for SEO and LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on optimizing existing content: Refresh, merge duplicates, and improve 1000+ existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [New content strategy targeting LLM citations: 8-10 high-quality articles/week, emphasis on product comparisons and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Workflow changes: GrowthX bringing in new team members to focus on content, freeing up Jason for strategy](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Strapi bringing in contractor (Mateo) for programmatic SEO, focusing on product marketing and use case pages](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Topics

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Identified 986 URLs from Strapi's sitemap, categorized into:](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Duplicate content: Old/similar URLs needing redirection](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [Refresh candidates: Content with declining traffic (\>20% drop) but good impressions](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Monitor: Well-performing content to keep an eye on](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [Keep: New or consistently performing content](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Low-performing: Consider redirecting or removing](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Plan to merge duplicate content on important topics to improve overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Adding canonical tags to handle blog series and similar content](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

### LLM Citation Strategy

  - [Tracking prompts in various categories (e.g., "CMS for developers")](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Identified 50-100 content pieces to prioritize based on prompt analysis](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Focus on product comparisons and alternatives, which are impactful for LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Refreshing comparison section of the website, which currently doesn't get picked up](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

### Content Production Plans

  - [New publishing cadence: 8-10 high-quality articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Potential for higher volume of programmatic comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Strapi team to add expert quotes and references during the review process](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

### Workflow Changes

  - [GrowthX bringing in new team members:](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [Mara (Director) and Vivek (ME) to focus on day-to-day content production](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [Jason shifting focus to SEO strategy and workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

### Comparison and Integration Pages

  - [Agreement on the importance of comparison pages for high-intent traffic](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Current comparison pages need optimization (less table-heavy, more SEO-friendly content)](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Short-term plan: Update comparison pages to follow blog post structure for easier SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Integration pages: Pausing major efforts after recent updates, focusing on other priorities](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share list of potential backlink targets with Strapi team for review](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Implement changes to enable canonicalization and merging of content in Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [GrowthX to map out articles for comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Strapi to finalize contract with Mateo for programmatic SEO work](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Resume content publishing next week with new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [GrowthX to introduce new team members (Mara and Vivek) in next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Start a thread on canonicalization and merging process, including potential CMS updates](https://fathom.video/share/u3a53stfgEmarxMHsmKuLvntLCe7bG5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
